name: Hand-Embroidered Chanderi Kurta
description: Exquisite hand-embroidered kurta crafted from pure Chanderi silk. Features delicate thread work, a elegant silhouette, and breathable fabric perfect for festive occasions.

name: Vintage Wash Classic Denim Jacket
description: A timeless wardrobe staple. This vintage-washed denim jacket is tailored for a standard relaxed fit, complete with copper buttons, chest pockets, and side welt entries.

name: Royal Velvet Evening Party Gown
description: Make a statement in this luxurious velvet gown. Designed with an elegant scoop neckline, a flowing floor-length drape, and a soft sheen that commands attention.

name: Linen Blend Casual Summer Shirt
description: An airy linen-blend shirt tailored for sunny days. Offers a lightweight texture, breathable wear, standard collar, and buttoned front for easy styling.

name: Graceful Chiffon Saree
description: Drape yourself in sophistication. This lightweight chiffon saree features subtle gold borders and a graceful flow, ideal for light evening wear or formal gatherings.

name: Pastel Embroidered Ensemble
description: A charming pastel-hued ethnic set. Beautifully embellished with hand-guided thread work, round neck styling, and matching trousers for a complete outfit.

name: Boho Chic Cotton Maxi
description: Effortless bohemian flair. This cotton maxi dress showcases a tiered design, adjustable tie straps, and an all-over floral print perfect for casual weekend strolls.

name: Classic Wrap Midi Dress
description: A flattering wrap dress featuring a tie closure at the waist, a V-neckline, and an elegant midi hemline. Tailored from a silky crepe fabric that flows with your movement.

name: Embellished Evening Wear
description: Celebrate special milestones in style. This embellished ensemble pairs intricate sequin and bead details with a modern premium design.

name: Handcrafted Designer Saree
description: A premium designer saree made by traditional weavers. Exquisite handloom textures, intricate pallu detailing, and matching blouse material included.

name: Casual Weekend Kurti
description: Comfortable cotton kurti featuring standard side slits and modern patterns, suited for daily errands or workwear.

name: Elegant Summer Breeze Dress
description: A breezy sundress styled with detailed lace trim and a breathable cotton weave to keep you fresh and fashionable on hot afternoons.
